message:
chore: rename dashboard package to termweb-dashboard

- Change from @termweb/dashboard to termweb-dashboard (unscoped)
- Update release workflow to check new package name

files.patch:
@@ -188,7 +188,7 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           cd packages/dashboard
           LOCAL_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
-          NPM_VERSION=$(npm view @termweb/dashboard version 2>/dev/null || echo "0.0.0")
+          NPM_VERSION=$(npm view termweb-dashboard version 2>/dev/null || echo "0.0.0")
           echo "Local: $LOCAL_VERSION, npm: $NPM_VERSION"
           if [ "$LOCAL_VERSION" != "$NPM_VERSION" ]; then
             echo "should_publish=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 {
-  "name": "@termweb/dashboard",
+  "name": "termweb-dashboard",
   "version": "0.2.1",
   "description": "Terminal-based system monitoring dashboard powered by termweb",
   "bin": {
